title: The xilinx_dsp packing register mechanism changes memory_pass.memory_dff behaviour when flattening

features.name: memory read with same-cycle register update via combinational path
features.description: Code should include a memory read operation in a clocked always block where a register variable is simultaneously updated by a combinational expression on the same clock edge

features.name: memory read address computation via register addition
features.description: Code should include a memory read with address computed by adding a register to another signal, where the register is also updated on the same clock edge
